blocker: The PR #466 wheel was present and the provider factory loaded, but the request metadata bridge failed during import probe because the install-time hash-tracking gate looked for get_hash_str in HiCacheController.__init__. SGLang 0.5.10.post1 assigns self.get_hash_str in attach_storage_backend before constructing the dynamic backend, so Cachet must validate and patch that attach-time shape while still wrapping the active controller instance at _storage_hit_query runtime.
